basic_details.job_title: ANIIMS Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS)
basic_details.short_information: Andaman and Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Executive Officer Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for healthcare jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their resume and documents to the official email address.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 62 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications for a retired Government Servant.
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 62 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications for a retired Government Servant.

qualification.education_qualification: Retired Assistant Secretary/ Assistant Director (Admn) of Central/State Govt./ UTs with good administrative experience OR Retired Officers of Central/ State Govt./UTs in level 06 with 5 years regular service in the grade before retirement and good administrative experience.
qualification.details: Retired Assistant Secretary/ Assistant Director (Admn) of the Central/State Govt./ UTs having good administrative experience. Retired Officers of the Central/ State Govt./UTs in level 06 (35400-112400) of the pay Matrix or equivalent with five (05) years regular service in the grade before retirement and having good Administrative experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Fixed monthly amount calculated by deducting basic pension from the pay drawn at the time of retirement.
salary_details.details: The remuneration to post retirement candidates will be as per Government of India Ministry of Finance, Department of Expenditure, New Delhi, OM No 3-25/2020-E.IIIA dated 9th December 2020. A Fixed monthly amount shall be admissible, arrived at by deducting the basic pension from the pay drawn at the time of retirement.

selection_process: Hybrid Interview (Virtual/in-person) Selection will be made on the basis of performance in the interview.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.andaman_and_nicobar_islands_institute_of: Fixed monthly amount calculated by deducting basic pension from the pay drawn at the time of retirement.

Retired Assistant Secretary/ Assistant Director (Admn) of Central/State Govt./ UTs with good administrative experience OR Retired Officers of Central/ State Govt./UTs in level 06 with 5 years regular service in the grade before retirement and good administrative experience.
Maximum 62 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications for a retired Government Servant.

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Executive Officer Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ANIIMS Executive Officer Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Retired Assistant Secretary/ Assistant Director (Admn) of the Central/State Govt./ UTs having good administrative experience. Retired Officers of the Central/ State Govt./UTs in level 06 (35400-112400) of the pay Matrix or equivalent with five (05) years regular service in the grade before retirement and having good Administrative experience.

rows.category: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 62 years as on the closing date of receipt of applications for a retired Government Servant.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: The remuneration to post retirement candidates will be as per Government of India Ministry of Finance, Department of Expenditure, New Delhi, OM No 3-25/2020-E.IIIA dated 9th December 2020. A Fixed monthly amount shall be admissible, arrived at by deducting the basic pension from the pay drawn at the time of retirement.

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last date of receipt / upload of application

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Hybrid Interview (Virtual/in-person) Selection will be made on the basis of performance in the interview.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 28-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ANIIMS Executive Officer Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ANIIMS Executive Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 28th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the eligibility criteria for the Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria include being a retired Assistant Secretary/Assistant Director (Admn) with good administrative experience, or retired officers in Level 06 with 5 years of regular service before retirement and good administrative experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for retired government servants applying for this post is 62 years as of the application closing date.

faq.question: Q4. How will the salary be determined for the selected candidate?
faq.answer: The salary will be a fixed monthly amount calculated by deducting the basic pension from the pay drawn at the time of retirement, as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Executive Officer position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a hybrid interview (virtual or in-person), and the final selection will be based on the candidate's performance in the interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. Eligible candidates need to send their application and relevant documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Executive Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Executive Officer post at ANIIMS.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: This is a Short Term Contract position at the Andaman and Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application Performa are available on the ANIIMS website (https://aniims.andamannicobar.gov.in) and the website of A & N Administration (https://andamannicobar.gov.in).
